name: sonner
title: Sonner
description: A Y2K toast notification system powered by Sonner — thick navy border, pastel accent tints, flat design.

files.content:
"use client"

import { Toaster as SonnerToaster } from "sonner"
import type { ComponentProps } from "react"

import { cn } from "@/lib/utils"

type ToasterProps = ComponentProps<typeof SonnerToaster>

/**
 * A Y2K-styled toast notification provider.
 *
 * Place `<Toaster />` once at the app root (inside `<body>`).
 * Trigger toasts imperatively with `toast` from `"sonner"`:
 *
 * ```tsx
 * import { toast } from "sonner"
 *
 * toast.success("Saved!")
 * toast.error("Oops!")
 * toast("Plain message")
 * ```
 *
 * Y2K design: thick navy border, white flat background, pastel left-border
 * accents per type, monospace labels, and a close button on every toast.
 */
function Toaster({ toastOptions, className, ...props }: ToasterProps) {
  return (
    <SonnerToaster
      closeButton
      className={cn("toaster group", className)}
      toastOptions={{
        unstyled: false,
        classNames: {
          toast:
            "group-[.toaster]:border-2 group-[.toaster]:border-[#1b1b3a] " +
            "group-[.toaster]:rounded-[6px] group-[.toaster]:bg-white " +
            "group-[.toaster]:text-[#1b1b3a] group-[.toaster]:font-mono " +
            "group-[.toaster]:text-sm group-[.toaster]:shadow-none " +
            "group-[.toaster]:p-3 group-[.toaster]:gap-2 " +
            "group-[.toaster]:[&_*]:font-mono",
          title:
            "group-[.toaster]:text-[#1b1b3a] group-[.toaster]:font-bold " +
            "group-[.toaster]:text-sm group-[.toaster]:m-0",
          description:
            "group-[.toaster]:text-[#1b1b3a]/70 group-[.toaster]:text-xs " +
            "group-[.toaster]:m-0",
          closeButton:
            "group-[.toaster]:bg-white group-[.toaster]:border-2 " +
            "group-[.toaster]:border-[#1b1b3a] group-[.toaster]:text-[#1b1b3a] " +
            "group-[.toaster]:rounded-[4px] group-[.toaster]:size-5 " +
            "group-[.toaster]:[&>svg]:size-3 " +
            "group-[.toaster]:hover:bg-[#d7dde8] " +
            "group-[.toaster]:transition-colors " +
            "group-[.toaster]:absolute group-[.toaster]:right-2 group-[.toaster]:top-2 " +
            "group-[.toaster]:flex group-[.toaster]:items-center group-[.toaster]:justify-center",
          success:
            "group-[.toaster]:border-l-4 group-[.toaster]:border-l-[#ffe45e]",
          error:
            "group-[.toaster]:border-l-4 group-[.toaster]:border-l-[#ff8fcf]",
          info: "group-[.toaster]:border-l-4 group-[.toaster]:border-l-[#8ed1fc]",
          warning:
            "group-[.toaster]:border-l-4 group-[.toaster]:border-l-[#b69cff]",
          icon: "group-[.toaster]:text-[#1b1b3a] group-[.toaster]:m-0",
          content:
            "group-[.toaster]:flex group-[.toaster]:flex-col group-[.toaster]:gap-0.5",
          actionButton:
            "group-[.toaster]:bg-[#ffe45e] group-[.toaster]:text-[#1b1b3a] " +
            "group-[.toaster]:border-2 group-[.toaster]:border-[#1b1b3a] " +
            "group-[.toaster]:rounded-[4px] group-[.toaster]:px-2.5 " +
            "group-[.toaster]:py-1 group-[.toaster]:text-xs " +
            "group-[.toaster]:font-bold group-[.toaster]:font-mono " +
            "group-[.toaster]:hover:bg-[#ff8fcf] " +
            "group-[.toaster]:transition-colors",
          cancelButton:
            "group-[.toaster]:bg-white group-[.toaster]:text-[#1b1b3a] " +
            "group-[.toaster]:border-2 group-[.toaster]:border-[#1b1b3a] " +
            "group-[.toaster]:rounded-[4px] group-[.toaster]:px-2.5 " +
            "group-[.toaster]:py-1 group-[.toaster]:text-xs " +
            "group-[.toaster]:font-mono " +
            "group-[.toaster]:hover:bg-[#d7dde8] " +
            "group-[.toaster]:transition-colors",
        },
        ...toastOptions,
      }}
      {...props}
    />
  )
}

export { Toaster }
